description: Growbots is an all-in-one outbound sales platform with a large prospect database, AI targeting, and automated email outreach for small and mid-size teams.
overview: Growbots combines a large prospect database with AI targeting and automated email outreach and follow-ups, helping SMB teams find decision-makers and build pipeline in one place.
what_is: Growbots is an outbound sales platform built for small and mid-size teams. It pairs a large contact database with AI-powered prospecting and runs email outreach and follow-ups, so lead discovery and sending live in one tool instead of several.

It is strongest for sales teams, founders, and marketers that want a reliable outbound pipeline quickly, including those new to outbound. A/B testing, email verification, and available expert support help campaigns perform.

Growbots integrates with CRMs and email tools to fit the stack. It is built for straightforward, higher-volume outbound prospecting rather than inbound management or highly customized sales processes.
